defects.title: Relative non-root href values are hard-rejected during LINK route extraction
defects.why_it_fails: Many sites use relative links like 'about' or './pricing'. Current logic drops these links before normalization, which can cause low/zero internal route discovery and downstream ROUTE_EXTRACTION failures.

defects.title: Surface-context logic reads first_screen_text_length but route signal map does not populate it
defects.why_it_fails: The consumer uses first_screen_text_length in SURFACE_CONTEXT but producer omits this field, so the value is implicitly 0 and biases article value checks.

defects.title: CAPTURE stage has no bootstrap stage marker before external capture tool call
defects.why_it_fails: Unlike ENTRY/LINK_FETCH/ROUTE_EXTRACTION/ROUTE_SELECTION, CAPTURE lacks Write-BootstrapStageTrace marker, reducing crash localization precision in failure-tail artifacts.

defects.title: run_report schema page_verdicts contract no longer matches agent output shape
defects.exact_evidence_snippet: schema requires page_verdicts fields [route, route_type, visual_status, verdict, issue_count]
defects.why_it_fails: agent.ps1 writes page_verdicts objects with classification/signals/surface_type/surface_expectation/defect_candidates/evidence_refs/confidence, so schema validation is stale.

defects.title: findings enum excludes issue types emitted by active report layer
defects.exact_evidence_snippet: schema enum: BROKEN_ROUTE, THIN_ROUTE, CAPTURE_FAILURE, ROUTE_OVERFLOW_ONLY
defects.why_it_fails: agent.ps1 emits PROCESS_FIRST, NO_VALUE_FIRST_SCREEN, NO_ACTION_PATH; current schema rejects valid active findings.

defects.title: failure_summary schema contract diverges from written failure artifact payload
defects.exact_evidence_snippet: schema requires message; agent writes error_message/fail_phase/fail_class/notes
defects.why_it_fails: Failure artifact generated by agent.ps1 cannot validate against declared failure_summary schema, breaking contract-first expectations.

defects.title: Duplicate Get-SafeRouteClassification function definitions in same module
defects.exact_evidence_snippet: Get-SafeRouteClassification is declared twice with equivalent logic.
defects.why_it_fails: Duplicate function bodies increase contract drift risk and maintenance ambiguity for route selection behavior.

defects.title: Active workflow runs on ubuntu pwsh rather than PowerShell 5.1 target runtime
defects.why_it_fails: PS5.1 compatibility is a critical contract, but CI path executes with PowerShell 7 on Linux, so runtime contract compliance is not actually exercised in active flow.

defects.title: Href resolution helper exists but is not used by active extraction loop
defects.exact_evidence_snippet: Get-HrefResolutionResult is defined but foreach href loop reimplements ad-hoc branching.
defects.why_it_fails: Unused helper and duplicate inline logic increase divergence risk for URI handling and rejection classification behavior.
